case_title: LORENA LOPEZ VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-11-2011 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-01-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506.
